item.title: They’re basically ensuring she will run away rebel and lie
item.description: “Checkoutmypearlywhites I’m also bisexual and afraid to tell them” this kids gonna have it rough edit: don’t Message me scolding me for going against God and especially saying she’s damned for being bi you psycho maniacs. I operate on my own moral compass and when I meet my maker will duke it out then. Edit: shout out to cute rocker chicks. It is tradition when I make a decent post. Cheers and happy Sunday everyone.

item.title: Got a jamon on clearance for $50. We ate it for a month and now it's finally gone
item.description:
Banana. Jamon serrano for scale
Took the jamon to my sister's house for Christmas
Jamon and ramen
Jamon carbonara
Jamon and fruit and cheese and shit
Jamon benedict
Jamon and Le big Mac. Fries with jamon and hollandaise
Peep the fancy radish carving
Jamon and fried dumps
Green eggs and jamon
Jamon and strawberry shortcakes
Roast chicken and taters with green beans and jamon
Jamon cheese toastie and tomato soup
Wedge salad with crispy jamon, tomato soup with crispy jamon, cheese toastie with no jamon
Carving starting to get tricky
Potato and corn chowder
Rice cake and dumpling soup with jamon
Minced jamon for jamon gravy
Biscuits and jamon gravy
Flipped to the babilla side of the jamon. Getting lazy with carving at this point to just power through the jamon
Jamon and pineapple pizza
Nearing the end of the jamon
Split pea and jamon soup
Jamon breakfast plate
French toast, jamon, egg, and cheese
Jamon and potatoes with parmesan
Deviled eggs with crispy jamon served next to a deviled egg platter
Crispy jamon nibs
Mac and cheese and crispy jamon with collard greens and jamon
Jamon sushi things
Jamon and barley soup
Jamon bloody mary
Jamon quiche
JLT (jamon, lettuce, and tomato)
Jamon and Thai takeout
Jamon pot pie
Drunken jamon and eggs
Jamon and curry
Jamon sharkcoochie
Jamon donut
Jamon breakfast tacos
Salad with crispy jamon
Jamon fried rice
Jamon calzone. Non-jamon pizza
Chili garlic noods with jamon
Baked brie with jamon jam
Made beef and jamon bone soup. @dogmeatsfood on the social things. Thanks for following our jamon journey
item.dc:creator: Turtleramen

item.dc:creator: RGVhome

item.title: Lyft Driver Extortion
item.description:
I lost my phone in a Lyft driver's car. He starts off saying he is in Sacramento and can't give me my phone.
What he doesn't know is that I can see where he has my phone. I share my location with my fiancé. I can see him giving lifts all over SF
My phone had my debit card attached to it. I couldn't pay his extortion.
It costs nothing to do the right thing.
I get angry and refuse to be intimidated by extortion
Don't ever be a victim of extortion! Sure he kept my material possessions but, I filed a police report. Now I am after his job. If you are from SF and have had something similar happen from the driver named above contact me and I will give you a case number you can call to report this a-hole.
item.dc:creator: Isolde88

Thank You @nothingfucksyouharderthantime For This Burger Submission! 12/10 Previous Day 239: https://imgur.com/gallery/XFiubdt MESSAGE ME BURGER PICS OR YOUR FAVORITE BURGER SPOTS! item.title: 50 variations of Serotonin for your Monday morning

You can hear it, right?
It does slap
She's a keeper
Asian parents showing off
Can someone name this song, I know it but from where?
The engineer has a factor of safety, but was it high enough?
That eye roll
Channel 5
She's Grandma, 120 yrs old

item.title: Wholesome post to brighten your day 589
item.description:
https://imgur.com/gallery/FtWkLif Wholesome Post 588 https://imgur.com/gallery/ajvoklC Wholesome Post 587 https://imgur.com/gallery/p7pu0ke Wholesome Post 586 https://imgur.com/gallery/XigKo5W Wholesome Post 585 https://imgur.com/gallery/FF8mNWf Wholesome Post 584 https://imgur.com/gallery/9MIkeB4 Wholesome Post 583 https://imgur.com/gallery/xyMeaV0 Wholesome Post 582
I include a Gofundme link in all of my posts to help raise money for people in need. I hope we can help https://www.gofundme.com/f/help-sadie-and-the-beans-get-treatment
I made a wholesome support server on discord, whether you need support would like to give it or just want to chat with some lovely people and look at some wholesome things it's a nice place. Here's the link if you'd like to join us. https://discord.gg/Y4U422F
I hope this post brightened your day :) and i hope it is a lovely day for you! If you need to talk I am always available on discord (username HaveAGreatDay# 9735) and happy to listen. You matter, and if you are struggling please reach out for help. I made a wholesome support server on discord, whether you need support would like to give it or just want to chat with some lovely people and look at some wholesome things it's a nice place. Here's the link if you'd like to join us. https://discord.gg/Y4U422F

item.title: I have too many memes (vol. 41) - a daily dump
item.description: Volume 41 of basically free* memes! Do whatever you want today. Today is your day. Be strong. Be fierce. Drink water from a stream. Enter a triathlon. Kick a toddler. Worship Satan on a mountain top. Steal cheese. Lick a softball. It's your day.

item.dc:creator: lucanus43

item.title: Recovering from morbid obesity: recently reached 100lbs lost!
item.description: I'm 180cm/5'11 and my starting weight was somewhere around 333lbs+/151kg+ (not sure exactly, my scale only measures up to 150kg). I currently weigh 233lbs/105kg. My weight gain history is the somewhat typical "played sports in high school then stopped, but continued eating like I was still playing", combined with a sitting job, stress, autoimmune medications (and some trauma), and let it fester for a decade. I neglected my health long enough, and in January 2021 I started calorie counting, as well as increasing my activity from practically zero to 5-10k steps a day and occasional swimming and strength training. About 6 months in, I picked up light IF to curb snacking and regulate my meal times. I hope to lose another 55-65lbs/25-30kg and work on muscle maintenance. To be honest, when I started I didn't think I would get this far. I kept thinking "I wish I was like 100lbs lighter already" and the amount of time it actually takes to get there was and is daunting. But for me, today is the day, the day I was wishing for back then. I just want to be healthy (well, as much as my autoimmune condition lets me, but you get it...). The mental healing is probably a lot harder than the actual diet/exercise. People don't just get this fat "for fun", there is so much sh*t you're repressing with the maladaptive coping mechanism of eating. Please don't neglect your mental health. If you were looking for a sign that you needed to take care of yourself, this is it. Make your future self proud.
item.dc:creator: mgunjigwy

item.title: a 1960s throwback dump
item.description:
Julie Christie, August 1962
Fans outside the Warwick Hotel, 1965
Ronnie Spector during lunchtime at George Washington High School in Washington Heights, 1961. Brian Wilson declared 'Be My Baby' the greatest pop record ever made. Ronnie is the only Ronette that appears on the track.
Fans near the 'Free Stage' at Woodstock, 1969.
Bruce Lee training Sharon Tate for the movie 'The Wrecking Crew' (1968). In an action scene with Nancy Kwan (right). This was Tate's last film to be released before her death in 1969.
Behind-the-scenes on the set of "In the Heat of the Night" (1967), Sidney Poitier and Norman Jewison
A Southern California high school student walks toward classmates while wearing the “Mini Jupe” skirt 1969
Joni Mitchell singing 'The Circle Game' on August 17, 1966
1968
Bob Dylan and activist Mimi Fariña, at Viking Hotel, Newport, Rhode Island 1964
In Haight-Ashbury, California’s countercultural epicenter 1968
A Japanese and Polish couple, 1960s
London Pub, 1967
English actress Vanessa Redgrave, one of the few performers to achieve the Triple Crown of Acting (Oscar, Emmy Award, and Tony) May 2, 1966
Station wagon road trip
1967
In the Soviet Union, 1969
Cheerleaders at Hinsdale Central High School congratulate John Kinsella on his return from the 1968 Olympics in Mexico City
Five models lying on surfboards in the ocean 1966
Singer Joan Baez sits at the corner of Haight and Ashbury in San Francisco, serenading hippies and tourists. September 22, 1967
1969
Tommy Kono, Timmy Leong, and Carole Hunguford, 1961 Tommy, a Sacramento native, is the United States' most accomplished male weightlifter to date, winning Olympic and world championship medals in three different weight divisions.
September, 1968
Fashion designer Mary Quant and her Ginger Group of girls in Market Street Manchester, 10th February 1966
Writer Joan Didion in her L.A. home in 1968. Her writing during the 60s through the late 70s engaged audiences in the realities of the counterculture and the Hollywood lifestyle. In 1991, she wrote the earliest mainstream media article to suggest the Central Park Five had been wrongfully convicted. She passed away last December.
Picnickers ready to get in a full day of recreation on the lake as dad helps unload the 1962 Studebaker Lark Daytona Wagonaire.
Passengers at JFK Airport watch Apollo 11 on a TV
item.dc:creator: Natot45Hanks
